• Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps.
  • Features include building structures, upgrading equipment, trading with other players, and exploring underground.
  • Uses MQTT for real-time multiplayer networking and IndexedDB for local save storage.
  • Mobile controls are available with touch-friendly interface and chat system.
  • Includes texture import system and cloud sync capabilities through Puter integration.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.localPlayer = { id: uuid(), gridX: CONSTANTS.MAP_WIDTH/2, gridY: 4, x: 0, y: 0, fuel: 100, maxFuel: 100, hull: 100, maxHull: 100, cargo: 0, maxCargo: 50, money: 0, temp: 0, maxTemp: 100, rotation: 0, isDrilling: false, drillTier: 0, heatResist: 0, xrayRange: 3, multiMine:0, inventory: {}, selectedBlock: TILE_TYPES.CASING, stats: { blocksMined: {}, totalMined: 0, startTime: now() }, joinedAt: now(), teleporters: [] }; this.map = []; this.discovered = []; this.remotePlayers = {}; this.camera = { x: 0, y: 0 }; this.zoom = 1.0; this.particles = []; this.explosives = []; this.isAdmin = false; this.hostId = null; this.bannedIds = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mm_banned') || '[]'); this.lastActionTime = 0; this.lastAutosave = 0; this.lastViewportSync = 0; this.fallHeight = 0; this.stationGridX = CONSTANTS.MAP_WIDTH / 2; this.stationGridY = 4; this.lastHostHeartbeat = 0; } }

Mega Miner NG is a comprehensive multiplayer mining game that combines procedural generation with real-time networking. The game features a full 3D mining experience where players can dig for resources, build structures, upgrade equipment, and interact with other players through trading and chat systems. With mobile support, cloud sync capabilities, and extensive customization options, it provides a complete mining adventure that can be played across different devices and platforms.
